message:
fix(pages): add epoch guards and deduplicate event listeners across modules

Prevent stale async callbacks from writing to detached DOM by adding
epoch-based invalidation in search, settings, and viewer; deduplicate
service worker activation, controllerchange, and cleanup handlers with
WeakSet/boolean guards; expose cleanupSettings() and call it on viewer
teardown; add route-leave cleanup for conversation, search, and stats.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
